prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约10810→11739→13586→16227→19004，连续5年持续后移，近3年累计后移约5400名，2025年基准约19004名，呈加速后移趋势；本省物理类计划2021年150人、2022年174人、2023年165人、2024年165人、2025年203人；2026年计划218人，较2025年扩招约7.4%，计划增加使竞争略有缓解，但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第45位稳步上升至2026年第42位，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2022年声誉偏负面（食堂事件），近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第34位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度一般偏热；未见明显投档断档记录；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、化学A-、控制科学与工程A-，化工领域学科实力突出，与招生专业中的化工与制药类、化学类等高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，化工类（生化环材）明显劝退；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增加约45%，物理类考生估算约38万，竞争显著加剧；华东理工大学位于上海，对江苏考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江苏招生占比约21.7%（2025年），为外省最大生源地，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约7.4%但考生总数大幅增加约45%、学校排名稳步上升及声誉平稳，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年19004名基础上继续后移，但扩招效应部分抵消考生增加压力；预测最低位次约19747名，区间19247–20247名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10810 → 11739 → 13586 → 16227 → 19004, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5400 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 19004, showing an accelerating backward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 150 in 2021, 174 in 2022, 165 in 2023, 165 in 2024, and 203 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 218, an increase of about 7.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition due to the enrollment expansion, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, reputation was slightly negative (cafeteria incident), but has been stable in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 34th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating generally moderate to high application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps recorded. Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in the country), Chemistry is A-, Control Science and Engineering is A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength in the chemical engineering field, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Chemistry, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Chemical Engineering (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu general college entrance examination candidates is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 380,000, leading to sharply intensified competition. East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates. The school's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 21.7% (2025), making it the largest source of students outside the province, with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.4% but a significant increase of about 45% in total candidates, the steady rise in school ranking, and stable reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 19004, but the expansion effect partially offsets the pressure from increased candidates. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19747, with a range of 19247–20247.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligence and Robotics)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Double Degree)
- Computer Science and Technology (Double Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics
- Chemistry (Ministry of Education Top Talent Base Class)
- Physics
- Engineering Pilot Class (Biomedicine)
- Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Mechanization Pilot Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Smart Chemical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering
- Engineering Pilot Class (Energy and Environment)
- Materials Science (New Materials Pilot Class)
- Pharmacy (Innovation Pilot Class)
- Bioengineering
- Economics
- Landscape Architecture (Future Human Settlement Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19247–20247, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 19247), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Mathematics, Chemistry Top Talent Base Class, or Engineering Pilot Classes to ensure admission probability.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4377 → 5382 → 5997 → 6638 → 7023, continuously moving backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1026 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 7023, and the rate of backward shift is slowing. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 78 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 65 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 63, a reduction of about 3.1% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition due to the enrollment reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years. In 2022, reputation was slightly negative (cafeteria incident), but has been stable in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with moderate to slightly high application attention. No obvious admission gaps or breaks have been recorded. Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+, Chemistry is A-, Control Science and Engineering is A-. The university is primarily science and engineering, and the History Category majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages, etc.) have low correlation with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended, Teacher Training is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the enrollment reduction of about 3.1% in 2026 but a significant increase of about 44% in the total number of examinees, and the steady rise in university ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 7023. The effect of enrollment reduction is slightly greater than the increase in examinees. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6843, with a range of 6343–7343.
